from pathlib import Path
p = Path('predict.py')
s = p.read_text()
old = "for key in ['feature_head_state_dict', 'feature_head_state', 'feature_head', 'head_state_dict', 'head', 'model_state_dict', 'state_dict']:"
new = "for key in ['feature_head_state_dict', 'classifier_state_dict', 'feature_head_state', 'feature_head', 'head_state_dict', 'head', 'model_state_dict', 'state_dict']:"
if old in s:
    s = s.replace(old, new)
# Insert optional class_bias after prior-logp correction in feature-head prediction.
old2 = "        if logp is not None and tau != 0.0:\n            logits = logits + tau * logp\n        preds.extend([int(v) for v in logits.argmax(1).detach().cpu().tolist()])"
new2 = "        if logp is not None and tau != 0.0:\n            logits = logits + tau * logp\n        cb = ckpt.get('class_bias', None) if isinstance(ckpt, dict) else None\n        if cb is not None:\n            cb = torch.as_tensor(cb, device=device, dtype=logits.dtype)\n            if cb.numel() == logits.shape[1]:\n                logits = logits + cb.view(1, -1)\n        preds.extend([int(v) for v in logits.argmax(1).detach().cpu().tolist()])"
if old2 in s:
    s = s.replace(old2, new2)
p.write_text(s)
print('patched predict.py')
